es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.net.http.java

Class MultipartData

  • java.lang.Object
    • es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.net.http.java.MultipartData

  • public class MultipartData
extends java.lang.Object
    Class that builds multipart data for 'post' method.

      MultipartData(java.nio.charset.Charset charset)

      Add file type parameter.
      byte[] finishData()
      Finish MultipartData data stream and return data as byte array.

      Get the boundary of multipart content data.

      Get the 'Content-Type' request property with boundary.

        public void addPart(java.lang.String paramName,
                    java.io.File file)
             throws java.io.IOException
        Add file type parameter.
        Parameters:
        paramName -
        file - file parameter to send.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if paramName or file is null.
        java.io.IOException

      • addPart

        public void addPart(java.lang.String paramName,
                    android.net.Uri file,
                    android.content.Context context)
             throws java.io.IOException
        Add file type parameter.
        Parameters:
        paramName -
        file - file parameter to send.
        context - application context to resolve file stream.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if paramName or file or context is null.
        java.io.IOException

        Finish MultipartData data stream and return data as byte array.
        Returns:

        public java.lang.String getBoundary()
        Get the boundary of multipart content data.
        Returns:
        The boundary identifier.

      • getContentTypeProperty

        public java.lang.String getContentTypeProperty()
        Get the 'Content-Type' request property with boundary.
        Returns:
        'Content-Type' request property information.
